nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Sink benchmark tool entry point that drives configurable datagen sources through sink connectors and measures throughput with percentile statistics.

nodes.name: schema.yml
nodes.summary: YAML schema definition for the sink benchmark specifying table name, primary key, and column descriptors for data generation.

nodes.name: sink_option.yml
nodes.summary: YAML configuration options for multiple sink connector types (Kafka, MySQL, Iceberg, etc.) used in benchmarking.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Cargo build script for the cmd_all crate generating compile-time metadata for the all-in-one binary.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the cmd_all crate that bundles all RisingWave component binaries into a single all-in-one executable.

nodes.name: risingwave.rs
nodes.summary: Main entry point for the all-in-one risingwave binary, dispatching to compute, frontend, meta, compactor, and other component modes based on CLI arguments.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation explaining the cmd_all crate and how the all-in-one RisingWave binary dispatches to different component modes.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the cmd crate providing the risectl command-line binary for RisingWave cluster management.

nodes.name: ctl.rs
nodes.summary: Entry point binary for risectl, the command-line tool used to manage and diagnose RisingWave clusters.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library root for the cmd crate, re-exporting CLI parsing and execution logic for the risectl tool.

nodes.name: bench_array.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark measuring array type serialization and deserialization performance.

nodes.name: bench_column_aware_row_encoding.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for column-aware row encoding and decoding across various data type combinations.

nodes.name: bench_data_chunk_compact.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for DataChunk compaction with visibility bitmaps.

nodes.name: bench_data_chunk_encoding.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for DataChunk Protobuf encoding and decoding performance.

nodes.name: bench_encoding.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for serialized row encoding formats (value-based and memcomparable) across various data types.

nodes.name: bench_hash_key_encoding.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for hash key encoding across different data type combinations used in aggregation and join operators.

nodes.name: bench_lru.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for the LRU cache implementation measuring insertion and lookup throughput.

nodes.name: bench_sequencer.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for row sequencer and sorter operations used in batch processing pipelines.

nodes.name: bitmap.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for bitmap operations (AND, OR, iteration) used in DataChunk visibility tracking.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_common crate defining its extensive dependency tree for shared types, utilities, and infrastructure.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_common_service crate providing shared service infrastructure components.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_common_estimate_size crate used for heap memory size estimation.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_fields_derive proc-macro crate generating field accessor implementations.

nodes.name: test_empty_pk.rs
nodes.summary: Auto-generated test output by the fields-derive proc-macro showing generated code for a struct with an empty primary key.

nodes.name: test_no_pk.rs
nodes.summary: Auto-generated test output by the fields-derive proc-macro showing generated code for a struct with no primary key.

nodes.name: MockRangeLogReader
nodes.summary: Mock log reader for benchmarking that streams synthetic data chunks through the sink write pipeline with optional throughput tracking.

nodes.name: ThroughputMetric
nodes.summary: Throughput metrics collector that accumulates chunk-size samples and computes percentile statistics (p50, p90, p99) for benchmark output.

nodes.name: MockDatagenSource
nodes.summary: Mock data generator source creating synthetic data streams via DatagenSplitReader for configurable sink benchmarking.

nodes.name: TableSchemaFromYml
nodes.summary: Deserialized YAML struct representing a table schema with column definitions and primary key indices for benchmarking.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.summary: CLI configuration struct for the sink benchmark tool specifying schema/option YAML paths, sink type, and throughput parameters.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Async entry point that loads benchmark config, initializes datagen source and sink, and runs the throughput measurement loop.

nodes.name: print_throughput
nodes.summary: Computes and prints throughput percentile statistics (p50, p90, p99, max rows/sec) from collected timing samples.
